changes.motivation: After migrating from pnpm to bun, the Containerfile was updated to COPY bun.lock instead of pnpm-lock.yaml, but .dockerignore was never updated. The .dockerignore uses a deny-all * pattern and whitelists specific files, so bun.lock was silently excluded from the Docker build context, causing the build to fail.
changes.summary: Updated .dockerignore to replace !pnpm-lock.yaml and !pnpm-workspace.yaml with !bun.lock, ensuring bun.lock is included in the Docker build context.

problems: Incomplete pnpm-to-bun migration: the Containerfile was updated to reference bun.lock but .dockerignore was not updated in the same changeset. Since .dockerignore uses a deny-all * pattern at the top and then whitelists files, adding a new lockfile requires a corresponding whitelist entry — this coupling was not obvious and not documented anywhere near the Containerfile or migration commit.
